meta.name: Marker genes per cluster
meta.description: Rank differentially expressed marker genes per Leiden cluster (Wilcoxon), keep the significant ones (uns['rank_genes_groups'] + uns['rank_genes_groups_filtered']), then draw a dotplot of the top markers. Needs an obs['leiden'] column (present on visium_hne, or run a preprocessing recipe first).

readme: Ranks differentially expressed marker genes per cluster with the chosen test, filters to the significant ones, then draws a dotplot of the top marker genes per cluster. Requires the `groupby` obs column — `leiden` is present on visium_hne, or run 'Preprocess & cluster (raw counts)' / 'QC, filter & cluster (raw counts)' first.

params.name: groupby
params.tooltip: obs column of cluster labels to rank markers within

params.name: method
params.tooltip: differential-expression test used to rank genes

params.name: n_genes
params.tooltip: top marker genes per cluster shown in the dotplot
